news.title:
Mutual funds added HDFC Bank, Suzlon, Groww; sold Tata Steel, Power Grid, Inox Wind in March.
Equity inflows hit Rs 40,450 cr in March; healthcare, IT, telecom holdings rose, financials trimmed.
news.summary:
Mutual funds added HDFC Bank, Suzlon, Groww; sold Tata Steel, Power Grid, Inox Wind in March.
Equity inflows hit Rs 40,450 cr in March; healthcare, IT, telecom holdings rose, financials trimmed.

news.title:
BofA Securities initiates coverage of Groww with a Buy rating and Rs 235 target.
They forecast 30% revenue CAGR FY26-FY28, driven by operating leverage and top-tier profitability.
news.summary:
BofA Securities initiates coverage of Groww with a Buy rating and Rs 235 target.
They forecast 30% revenue CAGR FY26-FY28, driven by operating leverage and top-tier profitability.

news.title:
Groww's stock has doubled since its IPO, showing strong performance.
Angel One rises over 5%, highlighting active trading in capital market stocks.
news.summary:
Groww's stock has doubled since its IPO, showing strong performance.
Angel One rises over 5%, highlighting active trading in capital market stocks.

news.title:
BofA Securities rates Groww (Billionbrains Garage Ventures) Buy, targets ₹235 with 30% revenue CAGR (FY26-28).
Profitability projected to rise to 67% EBITDA/52% PAT by FY28; risks include weak capital markets, lock-in expiry.
news.summary:
BofA Securities rates Groww (Billionbrains Garage Ventures) Buy, targets ₹235 with 30% revenue CAGR (FY26-28).
Profitability projected to rise to 67% EBITDA/52% PAT by FY28; risks include weak capital markets, lock-in expiry.

news.title:
Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd's board to review audited financial results for Q4 and FY ending March 31, 2026, on April 20, 2026.
Trading window remains closed till 48 hours post results declaration, per SEBI insider trading regulations.
news.summary:
Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd's board to review audited financial results for Q4 and FY ending March 31, 2026, on April 20, 2026.
Trading window remains closed till 48 hours post results declaration, per SEBI insider trading regulations.

news.title: Groww shares hit a post-listing high, rising 5% on strong volumes.
news.summary: Groww shares hit a post-listing high, rising 5% on strong volumes.

news.title:
Groww Value Fund revises allocation to 80-100% equity and 0-20% debt.
The updated asset allocation will take effect from April 1, 2026.
news.summary:
Groww Value Fund revises allocation to 80-100% equity and 0-20% debt.
The updated asset allocation will take effect from April 1, 2026.

news.title:
Billionbrains Garage Ventures gets CCI nod for investment deal in asset management.
Deal involves share subscription and purchase; order awaited but cleared by regulator.
news.summary:
Billionbrains Garage Ventures gets CCI nod for investment deal in asset management.

news.title:
8 of 15 startups listed in 2025 now trade below issue price, impacted by market volatility and reassessed profitability.
Lenskart, Groww, Meesho, Ather Energy outperform marginally; geopolitical tensions and aggressive IPO pricing weigh on investor sentiment.
news.summary:
8 of 15 startups listed in 2025 now trade below issue price, impacted by market volatility and reassessed profitability.
Lenskart, Groww, Meesho, Ather Energy outperform marginally; geopolitical tensions and aggressive IPO pricing weigh on investor sentiment.

news.title:
Jefferies adds Groww, SBI, and 5 others to its 23 buy ideas list.
New picks span banks, auto, steel, and internet sectors from 247 stocks.
news.summary:

news.title:
Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd announces analyst/investor meet on Mar 9-10, 2026, hosted by J.P. Morgan in Singapore.
Event details uploaded on www.groww.in, ensuring no price-sensitive info shared as per SEBI LODR regulations.

news.title:
Groww unveils AI-driven platform for trading, wealth, and fixed income.
Showcased at Groww Next 2026, it emphasizes consent and safeguards.

news.title:
Groww intensifies focus on wealth management and lending to diversify revenue streams.
CEO Lalit Keshre aims to lower reliance on Groww's broking business.
news.summary:
Groww intensifies focus on wealth management and lending to diversify revenue streams.

news.title:
Groww enhances AI-driven investing and trading as user base hits 16M.
Groww certified for ISO IEC compliance in Information Security Management.
news.summary:
Groww enhances AI-driven investing and trading as user base hits 16M.

news.title:
MTF grew 43% YoY to Rs 1.2 lakh crore in Jan 2026, driven by retail participation and fintech profitability, despite SEBI and RBI restrictions.
Major brokers, like Zerodha and Angel One, rely on internal accruals for MTF funding. Rising leverage poses systemic risks amid flat market returns.
news.summary:
MTF grew 43% YoY to Rs 1.2 lakh crore in Jan 2026, driven by retail participation and fintech profitability, despite SEBI and RBI restrictions.
Major brokers, like Zerodha and Angel One, rely on internal accruals for MTF funding. Rising leverage poses systemic risks amid flat market returns.

news.title:
RBI mandates 100% collateral for broker funding, impacting broking firms like Motilal Oswal, Jio Financial, and Angel One.
New rules effective April 2026 include 50% collateral for exchange guarantees, restricting bank funding for proprietary trading.
news.summary:
RBI mandates 100% collateral for broker funding, impacting broking firms like Motilal Oswal, Jio Financial, and Angel One.
New rules effective April 2026 include 50% collateral for exchange guarantees, restricting bank funding for proprietary trading.
